# Engineering Knowledge Base (Chinese Docs Index)

> English llms.txt for every file under `docs/zh`.

This file maps all Chinese source documents and navigation metadata into English descriptions for LLM retrieval.

## Root

- [Home Page](./index.md): Landing page for the Chinese knowledge base with module shortcuts.
- [Top Navigation](./_nav.json): Global navigation config for Home, Golang, MySQL, and Redis sections.
- [LLMs Index](./llms.txt): English machine-readable index for all files in this `docs/zh` tree.

## Golang

- [Golang Module Overview](./golang/index.mdx): Learning path and audience-oriented introduction to Go basics with RPress Badge components.
- [Go Install Guide](./golang/install/install.mdx): Cross-platform installation guide with RPress Tabs and Badge components.
- [Go Install on Windows](./golang/install/windows.mdx): Windows installation methods (MSI, Chocolatey, Scoop, ZIP, goup).
- [Go Install on macOS](./golang/install/macos.mdx): macOS installation methods (PKG, Homebrew, goup, source).
- [Go Install on Linux](./golang/install/linux.mdx): Linux installation methods (binary, apt, yum, snap, goup).
- [Hello World - First Go Program](./golang/hello.md): Step-by-step guide to writing and running the first Go application.
- [Golang Sidebar Metadata](./golang/_meta.json): Sidebar structure and labels for Golang module pages.
- [Golang LLMs Index](./golang/llms.txt): English machine-readable index for the Golang subdirectory.

## Golang Install

- [Go Installation Guide](./golang/install/index.md): Cross-platform Go installation overview and next steps.
- [Go Installation on Linux](./golang/install/linux.md): Linux installation methods including binaries and package managers.
- [Go Installation on macOS](./golang/install/macos.md): macOS installation options using PKG, Homebrew, and source.
- [Go Installation on Windows](./golang/install/windows.md): Windows installation options with MSI, package managers, and ZIP.
- [Install Section Metadata](./golang/install/_meta.json): Navigation metadata for installation subpages.
- [Install LLMs Index](./golang/install/llms.txt): English machine-readable index for the install subdirectory.

## MySQL

- [MySQL Module Overview](./mysql/index.md): Overview of modeling, performance governance, and operations workflow.
- [MySQL Schema Design](./mysql/schema-design.md): Core schema and table design principles for maintainable systems.
- [MySQL Transactions and Locks](./mysql/transactions-locks.md): Isolation levels, lock behavior, and deadlock troubleshooting path.
- [MySQL Performance Tuning](./mysql/performance-tuning.md): SQL tuning order and index-focused optimization checklist.
- [MySQL Operations Checklist](./mysql/operations-checklist.md): Pre-release, runtime, and post-incident operational checks.
- [MySQL Sidebar Metadata](./mysql/_meta.json): Sidebar grouping and labels for MySQL knowledge pages.
- [MySQL LLMs Index](./mysql/llms.txt): English machine-readable index for the MySQL subdirectory.

## Redis

- [Redis Module Overview](./redis/index.md): Overview of caching, reliability, and high-availability practices.
- [Redis Data Structures](./redis/data-structures.md): Scenario-based data structure selection guidance.
- [Redis Cache Patterns](./redis/cache-patterns.md): Common caching patterns and risk mitigation strategies.
- [Redis Persistence](./redis/persistence.md): RDB and AOF tradeoffs with durability recommendations.
- [Redis High Availability](./redis/high-availability.md): Sentinel/Cluster architecture choices and critical metrics.
- [Redis Sidebar Metadata](./redis/_meta.json): Sidebar grouping and labels for Redis knowledge pages.
- [Redis LLMs Index](./redis/llms.txt): English machine-readable index for the Redis subdirectory.
